task: Perform a root-cause screening for wafer yield excursions using only the provided fab packet. Apply the review-trigger rules (yield <85%, particle_count >35, overlay >5 nm). Produce a yield_excursion_report.xlsx containing calculations, assumptions, explicit citations to the provided packet rows/values, intermediate calculations, uncertainty/sensitivity notes, validation checks, and a final decision table that ties each recommendation to the supplied values. Do not invent additional records; mark any missing inputs as needs_review. The deliverable must be executable from the embedded packet alone (no external data lookup).
